response: Imagine you’re holding a flat, crumpled red balloon. You need to slide it into one of three openings: a five-pointed star, a perfect square, or a circle. Which hole will it fit through?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a deflated red ball. Put it into one of these holes: the star-shaped one, the square one, or the round one. Which one?
